label: Train Attack 1→10
detail: Chickens in Lumbridge. No food needed, fast kills.

label: Train Attack 10→30
detail: Cows east of Lumbridge or goblins. Drop bones for Prayer XP.

label: Train Attack 30→40
detail: Barbarians south of Edgeville. Equips steel weapons.

label: Train Attack 40→60
detail: Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers (Stronghold). Equips dragon weapons.

label: Train Attack 60→70
detail: Moss Giants, Blue Dragons, or Slayer tasks. Equips whip.

label: Train Attack 70→80
detail: Slayer tasks or Nightmare Zone AFK. Major accuracy gain.

label: Train Attack 80→99
detail: Nightmare Zone or Maniacal Monkeys for max melee.

label: Train Strength 1→10
detail: Chickens in Lumbridge.

label: Train Strength 10→30
detail: Cows or goblins near Lumbridge.

label: Train Strength 30→40
detail: Barbarians. Significant damage boost.

label: Train Strength 40→60
detail: Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers. Unlocks rune scimitar use.

label: Train Strength 60→70
detail: Moss Giants or Slayer. Unlocks barrows equipment access stat-wise.

label: Train Strength 70→80
detail: NMZ AFK for efficient Str gains.

label: Train Strength 80→99
detail: Maniacal Monkeys best-in-game Str XP.

label: Train Defence 1→10
detail: Chickens or crabs. Passive Defence XP from combat.

label: Train Defence 10→30
detail: Goblins or cows.

label: Train Defence 30→40
detail: Barbarians or Stronghold. Unlocks rune armour.

label: Train Defence 40→60
detail: Flesh Crawlers or Slayer tasks. Unlocks dragon and barrows armour.

label: Train Defence 60→70
detail: Slayer or NMZ.

label: Train Defence 70→80
detail: NMZ AFK.

label: Hitpoints 1→20 (passive)
detail: Hitpoints trains passively during combat. 1.33 XP per damage dealt.

label: Hitpoints 20→50 (passive)
detail: Accumulates during all combat training milestones.

label: Train Ranged 1→30
detail: Chickens and cows with shortbow. Cheap feathered arrows.

label: Train Ranged 30→40
detail: Ogresses or Experiments. Equips green dragonhide.

label: Train Ranged 40→55
detail: Seagulls at Port Sarim or Chinchompas. Equips maple shortbow.

label: Train Ranged 55→70
detail: Cannon tasks for fast Ranged XP. Unlocks black dragonhide.

label: Train Ranged 70→99
detail: Chinchompas at Ape Atoll or MM2 tunnels for best XP rate.

label: Train Prayer 1→22
detail: Bury regular bones. Unlocks Protect Item prayer.

label: Train Prayer 22→43
detail: Bury big bones or use guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Melee.

label: Train Prayer 43→52
detail: Dragon bones on guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Missiles.

label: Train Prayer 52→74
detail: Wyvern/Dragon bones on altar. Unlocks Piety (requires quests).

label: Train Magic 1→25
detail: Air Bolt and low alchemy. Unlocks Camelot Teleport.

label: Train Magic 25→43
detail: Superheat or Curse spells. Unlocks Superheat for Smithing XP.

label: Train Magic 43→55
detail: High Alchemy on stackable items. Core money maker.

label: Train Magic 55→70
detail: Alching or Bursting at Crabs. Unlocks Ice Barrage prerequisite path.

label: Train Magic 70→94
detail: Ancient Magicks Bursting/Barraging. Requires Desert Treasure.

label: Train Cooking 1→20
detail: Cook shrimps and anchovies. Use range to avoid burning.

label: Train Cooking 20→40
detail: Cook trout and salmon from Barbarian Village fishing spots.

label: Train Cooking 40→58
detail: Cook lobsters. Stop burning at 74 with cooking gauntlets.

label: Train Cooking 58→74
detail: Swordfish or sharks. Use cooking gauntlets for faster success rate.

label: Train Cooking 74→99
detail: Karambwans (1-tick) or wines for fastest XP. Karambwans require Tai Bwo Wannai Trio.

label: Train Woodcutting 1→15
detail: Regular trees near Lumbridge or Varrock. Use iron axe.

label: Train Woodcutting 15→30
detail: Oak trees. Bank in Draynor or drop logs.

label: Train Woodcutting 30→45
detail: Willow trees at Draynor Village. Near bank for convenient banking.

label: Train Woodcutting 45→60
detail: Maple trees at Seers' Village or Corsair Cove. Higher XP rate.

label: Train Woodcutting 60→75
detail: Yew trees in Woodcutting Guild or Edgeville. Profitable logs.

label: Train Woodcutting 75→99
detail: Redwood in Woodcutting Guild (requires 90) or Magic trees for profit.

label: Train Fletching 1→20
detail: Whittle and fletch arrow shafts from logs.

label: Train Fletching 20→40
detail: Fletch oak shortbows (u). Buy logs from GE.

label: Train Fletching 40→55
detail: Maple logs into maple longbows. String for additional XP and profit.

label: Train Fletching 55→70
detail: Yew shortbows (u). Fast XP, low cost per action.

label: Train Fletching 70→99
detail: Dragon darts or Magic longbow strings for fast XP. Dragon darts require RFD subquest.

label: Train Fishing 1→20
detail: Shrimps and anchovies at Draynor or Lumbridge Swamp.

label: Train Fishing 20→40
detail: Trout and salmon at Barbarian Village. Bank nearby.

label: Train Fishing 40→58
detail: Lobsters at Karamja or Catherby. Stocking food for combat.

label: Train Fishing 58→70
detail: Swordfish at Catherby or AFK Barb Fishing for simultaneous Str/Agil XP.

label: Train Fishing 70→99
detail: Barbarian Fishing 3-tick for best XP or Infernal Harpoon anglerfish.

label: Train Firemaking 1→15
detail: Normal logs from any tree. Light fires in a row.

label: Train Firemaking 15→30
detail: Oak logs from GE or Draynor oaks.

label: Train Firemaking 30→50
detail: Maple logs — good balance of XP/cost. Required for Desert Treasure.

label: Train Firemaking 50→75
detail: Yew or magic logs. Unlocks Wintertodt minigame at 50 FM threshold.

label: Train Firemaking 75→99
detail: Wintertodt — best XP/hr, fire-making supply crates, smithing/herblore/farming/fletching crate rewards.

label: Train Crafting 1→20
detail: Leather gloves and boots. Buy hides from GE.

label: Train Crafting 20→40
detail: Gold amulets (u) or sapphire rings for decent XP.

label: Train Crafting 40→54
detail: Green dragonhide bodies for fast XP. Buy from GE.

label: Train Crafting 54→70
detail: Blue/red dragonhide bodies for faster XP, higher material cost.

label: Train Crafting 70→99
detail: Black dragonhide bodies (best BIS XP/gp ratio) or unpowered orbs via glassblowing.

label: Train Smithing 1→15
detail: Bronze bars at Lumbridge furnace. Smelt then smith.

label: Train Smithing 15→30
detail: Iron bars. Buy from GE or mine in Al-Kharid mines.

label: Train Smithing 30→40
detail: Steel bars. Consider Superheat for simultaneous Magic XP.

label: Train Smithing 40→60
detail: Gold bars with Goldsmith gauntlets (Family Crest quest) for fast XP.

label: Train Smithing 60→70
detail: Blast Furnace mithril/adamant for best XP/gp ratio.

label: Train Smithing 70→99
detail: Blast Furnace rune bars — profit while training. Best GP/hr smithing method.

label: Train Mining 1→15
detail: Copper and tin in Lumbridge mines.

label: Train Mining 15→30
detail: Iron ore in Al-Kharid mine or Dwarven Mine. Drop ore for fast XP.

label: Train Mining 30→45
detail: Iron ore 3-tick Granite once unlocked, or regular iron ore drop-mining.

label: Train Mining 45→60
detail: 3-tick Granite in Kharidian Desert quarry for fast XP (requires waterskins/humidify).

label: Train Mining 60→75
detail: Motherload Mine for passive gold nugget accumulation and equipment upgrades.

label: Train Mining 75→99
detail: 3-tick Granite for fastest XP or Blast Mine for profit.

label: Train Herblore 1→10
detail: Clean grimy guam leaves. Requires Druidic Ritual quest.

label: Train Herblore 10→38
detail: Make attack, strength, or stat-restore potions. Buy secondaries from GE.

label: Train Herblore 38→55
detail: Super restore or prayer potions. Used heavily in bossing.

label: Train Herblore 55→70
detail: Super combat potions at 90 or anti-fire potions at 69.

label: Train Herblore 70→99
detail: Stamina potions, ranging potions, or divine potions for end-game. GP intensive.

label: Train Agility 1→10
detail: Gnome Stronghold course. No fail rate, steady XP.

label: Train Agility 10→30
detail: Gnome Stronghold then Draynor Village Agility course.

label: Train Agility 30→40
detail: Varrock Agility course. Unlocks graceful shortcut uses.

label: Train Agility 40→52
detail: Canifis Rooftop Course. Highest marks/hr early-mid game.

label: Train Agility 52→60
detail: Falador or Seers' Rooftop. Unlock shortcut network for efficient traversal.

label: Train Agility 60→90
detail: Ardougne Rooftop (best marks) or Werewolf Course. Graceful recolor at 260 marks.

label: Train Agility 90→99
detail: Ardougne Rooftop or Hallowed Sepulchre for best XP and loot.

label: Train Thieving 1→20
detail: Pickpocket men and women in Lumbridge or Edgeville.

label: Train Thieving 20→38
detail: Pickpocket HAM members in Lumbridge. Gems and clue scrolls.

label: Train Thieving 38→55
detail: Fruit stalls on Zeah or Guards in Ardougne.

label: Train Thieving 55→65
detail: Blackjack Menaphite thugs in Pollnivneach. Best XP/hr method, requires Desert Treasure area access.

label: Train Thieving 65→99
detail: Blackjack Menaphite thugs or Master Farmers at 38+ for seeds.

label: Train Slayer 1→20
detail: Slayer tasks from Turael (Burthorpe). Low-level monsters, easy tasks.

label: Train Slayer 20→50
detail: Tasks from Mazchna (Morytania requires Priest in Peril) or Vannaka.

label: Slayer tasks in Kharidian Desert
detail: Desert-region Slayer monsters. Kalphites, desert lizards, etc.

label: Train Slayer 50→75
detail: Duradel or Nieve assignments. Abyssal demons, blue dragons, fire giants.

label: Slayer tasks in Morytania
detail: Bloodvelds, gargoyles, abyssal demons. Excellent GP + XP combination.

label: Train Slayer 75→99
detail: High-value tasks: Hydra (82), Cerberus (91), Thermonuclear Smoke Devil (93).

label: Train Farming 1→17
detail: Plant potato, onion, and cabbage allotments. Use compost.

label: Train Farming 17→35
detail: Oak and willow saplings for tree patches. Trees give large XP dumps.

label: Train Farming 35→50
detail: Maple trees, watermelons, herb patches every 80 minutes.

label: Train Farming 50→70
detail: Yew trees and ranarr/snapdragon herbs. Significant profit.

label: Train Farming 70→99
detail: Magic/elder trees and dragonfruit/torstol herbs. Highly profitable, 2hr cycle.

label: Train Runecraft 1→27
detail: Air runes via Lumbridge Swamp altar. Unlocks lava runes method.

label: Train Runecraft 27→44
detail: Cosmic runes on Zanaris (requires Lost City quest). Unlocks double cosmic runes.

label: Train Runecraft 44→59
detail: Nature runes on Karamja. Unlocks double nats at 91.

label: Train Runecraft 59→75
detail: Lava runes with Ring of Dueling. Best XP/hr for Runecraft, low profit.

label: Train Runecraft 75→99
detail: Wrath runes (90+) or Lava runes with lunar spell. Raiments of the Eye for bonus output.

label: Train Hunter 1→9
detail: Crimson Swifts at Feldip Hills with bird snares.

label: Train Hunter 9→29
detail: Tropical Wagtails at Feldip Hills. Two traps at level 20.

label: Train Hunter 29→43
detail: Swamp Lizards or Barb-tailed Kebbits. Shift to box traps.

label: Train Hunter 43→60
detail: Chinchompas at the Piscatoris Hunter Area. Good XP and GP.

label: Train Hunter 60→99
detail: Red chinchompas at Feldip Hills or Maniacal Monkeys post-MM2 for best XP.

label: Train Construction 1→20
detail: Crude wooden chairs and rugs. Buy planks from GE.

label: Train Construction 20→40
detail: Oak chairs or larder. Oak planks give best XP/plank ratio at this tier.

label: Train Construction 40→55
detail: Oak dungeon doors or oak larder. Each action ~56 XP.

label: Train Construction 55→70
detail: Teak or mahogany furniture. Mahogany tables at 52 for fast AFK XP.

label: Train Construction 70→99
detail: Mahogany homes or mahogany tables for best XP. GP intensive.

label: Train Attack/Strength at Stronghold of Security
detail: Flesh Crawlers and Zombies offer fast melee XP with no food cost at mid levels.

label: Train at Ape Atoll (Maniacal Monkeys)
detail: Best melee XP in the game until very high levels. Requires Monkey Madness I completion.

label: Train at Nightmare Zone
detail: AFK melee training using quest bosses. Requires several quests completed.

label: Complete Recipe for Disaster (partial)
detail: Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves and NMZ bosses.

label: Complete Monkey Madness I
detail: Grants access to Ape Atoll and Maniacal Monkey tunnels.

label: Complete Desert Treasure
detail: Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.

label: Barrows runs (starter)
detail: Semi-consistent GP and gear. Entry-level bossing in Morytania.

label: Complete Priest in Peril
detail: Unlocks Morytania region access. Required before Barrows and Slayer tasks there.

label: God Wars Dungeon access
detail: Requires 60 Strength to enter. High-tier drops including Godswords.

label: Chambers of Xeric (entry)
detail: Requires strong all-round stats. Most valuable loot table in the game.

label: Complete Tale of the Righteous (Zeah intro)
detail: One of several quests enabling full Zeah access and CoX entry.

label: Complete Family Crest
detail: Grants Cooking gauntlets (stop burning food) and Goldsmith gauntlets (Smithing XP boost).

label: Complete Druidic Ritual
detail: Required to train Herblore. Short quest, no stat requirements.

label: Complete Lost City
detail: Unlocks Zanaris and cosmic rune altar. Grants access to dragon weaponry.

label: Complete The Feud
detail: Unlocks blackjacking in Pollnivneach for fast Thieving XP.

label: Complete Tai Bwo Wannai Trio
detail: Unlocks 1-tick Karambwan cooking for fast Cooking XP.
